name: Motor Selection Engine
description: Calculate required motor power from load and speed, then match to nearest standard motor size (IEC frame sizes).

steps.description: Required motor power accounting for efficiency and service factor

steps.formula: P_motor_required <= 0.37 ? 0.37 : P_motor_required <= 0.55 ? 0.55 : P_motor_required <= 0.75 ? 0.75 : P_motor_required <= 1.1 ? 1.1 : P_motor_required <= 1.5 ? 1.5 : P_motor_required <= 2.2 ? 2.2 : P_motor_required <= 3 ? 3 : P_motor_required <= 4 ? 4 : P_motor_required <= 5.5 ? 5.5 : P_motor_required <= 7.5 ? 7.5 : P_motor_required <= 11 ? 11 : P_motor_required <= 15 ? 15 : P_motor_required <= 18.5 ? 18.5 : P_motor_required <= 22 ? 22 : P_motor_required <= 30 ? 30 : P_motor_required <= 37 ? 37 : P_motor_required <= 45 ? 45 : P_motor_required <= 55 ? 55 : P_motor_required <= 75 ? 75 : P_motor_required <= 90 ? 90 : P_motor_required <= 110 ? 110 : 132
